en.skill.cooking.description: Turning raw supplies into safer meals.

en.skill.thieving.description: Opening what was meant to stay closed.
en.skill.smithing.title: Smithing
en.item.gold.title: Gold
en.item.lockpick.title: Lockpick
en.item.lockpick.description: A bent bit of metal for impatient doors.
en.item.note.title: Handwritten Note
en.item.note.description: A note in someone else's hand, tossed onto a shelf.
en.item.small-net.title: Small Net
en.item.small-net.description: A net suited to shallow shoals.
en.item.raw-shrimp.title: Raw Shrimp
en.item.cooked-shrimp.title: Cooked Shrimp
en.item.cooked-shrimp.description: A simple meal that keeps you going.
en.item.herb.title: River Herb
en.item.bowl.title: Bowl

en.item.uncooked-sleeping-draught.descripti: A murky mix that needs heat.
en.item.sleeping-draught.title: Sleeping Draught
en.item.sleeping-draught.description: A warm draught with a suspiciously calm smell.
en.item.copper-ore.title: Copper Ore
en.item.tin-ore.title: Tin Ore
en.item.tin-ore.description: A pale chunk of tin-bearing stone.
en.item.bronze-bar.title: Bronze Bar
en.item.iron-dagger.title: Iron Dagger
en.item.iron-dagger.description: A sharp shortcut from Denzel's chest.
en.quest.leave-tutorial-island.title: Leave Tutorial Island
en.quest.leave-tutorial-island.stage.accept: You have not taken on a task yet. Someone in this house looks like they know the island — try talking to them.
en.quest.leave-tutorial-island.stage.leave-: Miki the tutorial guide has tasked you with finding a way off of tutorial island. Step one is probably to leave his house.
en.quest.leave-tutorial-island.stage.visit-: You have made it outside. Word is there is a bank somewhere along the coast — worth a look before you go much further.
en.quest.leave-tutorial-island.stage.clear-: The bank is behind you now. Something below the island — through that trapdoor — is worth investigating.
You have got gear from the cave. Somewhere further in, Denzel mentioned voices — that is probably where you are headed next.
en.quest.leave-tutorial-island.stage.comple: Whatever is holding the mainland back from you will not last much longer. Keep pushing.
en.action.item.note.read.title: Read
en.dialogue.note.start:
It reads:
- Remember to tell them about the Quests tab.
- Remember to explain the colors: red, yellow, green.
- Remember to unlock the door before they leave.
en.modulePack.tutorial-island.title: Tutorial Island

en.location.tutorial-guide-house.title: Guide House
en.location.tutorial-guide-house.descriptio: A small room with a locked front door and too many helpful objects.
en.entity.miki.title: Miki
en.entity.front-door.title: Front Door
en.entity.mirror.title: Mirror
en.entity.drawer.title: Drawer
en.entity.bookshelf.title: Bookshelf
en.interaction.lockpicking.title: Lockpicking
en.interaction.lockpicking.player.hit: You work the lock and feel it give a little.
en.interaction.lockpicking.entity.hit: The lock does not fight back.
en.interaction.lockpicking.entity.miss: The lock does not fight back.
en.interaction.lockpicking.entity.kill: The lock does not fight back.
en.action.entity.miki.talk.title: Talk
en.action.entity.miki.examine.title: Examine
en.action.entity.front-door.pick.title: Pick Lock
en.action.entity.front-door.pick.descriptio: Work the lock with the lockpick.
en.action.wall-house-to-beach.title: Leave
en.action.entity.front-door.examine.title: Examine
en.action.entity.mirror.look.title: Look
en.action.entity.drawer.examine.title: Examine
en.action.entity.drawer.examine-both.title: Examine
en.action.entity.drawer.take-coins.title: Take coins
en.action.entity.drawer.take-coins.descript: Take the coins from the drawer.
en.action.entity.drawer.take-lockpick.title: Take lockpick
en.action.entity.drawer.take-lockpick.descr: Take the lockpick from the drawer.
en.action.entity.bookshelf.examine.title: Examine
en.action.entity.bookshelf.take-note.title: Take note
en.chat.entity.miki.examine: A guide with one eye on the door.
en.chat.entity.front-door.examine: A heavy door. The keyhole looks scratched, like someone was here before you.
en.chat.entity.front-door.pick: The lock gives with a soft click. Whatever is out there, you can reach it now.
en.chat.entity.mirror.look: You catch your reflection. Something about it does not feel like you yet.
en.chat.entity.drawer.examine-neither: You examine the drawer. A drawer full of random stuff. You see some coins on the bottom as well as a worn set of lockpicks.
en.chat.entity.drawer.examine-coins-only: A cluttered drawer with a worn set of lockpicks at the bottom.
en.chat.entity.drawer.examine-lockpick-only: A cluttered drawer with a few coins scattered among the junk.
en.chat.entity.drawer.examine-both: A drawer full of random junk.
en.chat.entity.bookshelf.examine-with-note: A packed bookshelf with leather bound tomes. There is a handwritten note tossed on the second shelf.
en.chat.entity.bookshelf.examine-taken: A packed bookshelf with leather bound tomes.
en.dialogue.miki.start: Oh — hi. You're the new arrival, right? I'm Miki, I look after new folks passing through here. What's on your mind before you head out?
en.dialogue.miki.option.ask-quests: What's this Quests tab I keep hearing about?
en.dialogue.miki.explain-quests: Right, the Quests tab — it's under Character, second row. Anything you take on shows up there with a line about what to do next. Handy when you forget what you were doing five minutes ago. Which, no judgment, happens to everyone here.
en.dialogue.miki.explain-colors: Quick version: red means you haven't started something, yellow means you're partway through, green means it's done. Glance at the dot before you open anything if you just want the status.
en.dialogue.miki.offer-quest: Speaking of which — want an actual task instead of just wandering? I can point you somewhere real.
en.dialogue.miki.maybe-later: Sure thing. Door's right there whenever you want to explore first — come find me again when you're ready.
en.dialogue.miki.option.accept: Go on then, give me something to do.
en.dialogue.miki.check-tab-prompt: Take a look at your Quests tab right now — you'll see it listed, red, since you haven't actually started it yet. Go on, I'll wait.
en.dialogue.miki.accept-node: There — now it should read yellow. That's you, officially underway. Leave Tutorial Island: find your way off this place.
en.dialogue.miki.farewell: Door's unlocked. Go on, get curious.

en.location.tutorial-beach.title: Shell Beach
en.location.tutorial-beach.description: Low shoals glitter beside a smoky campfire.
en.location.tutorial-beach.exhausted: The beach settles into gull cries and surf.
en.location.tutorial-hermit-grove.title: Hermit Grove
en.location.tutorial-hermit-grove.descripti: Herbs grow around a weathered hut beyond the palms.
en.location.tutorial-hermit-grove.exhausted: The grove smells of crushed leaves.
en.location.tutorial-bridge.title: Bridge Toll
en.location.tutorial-bridge.description: A narrow bridge crosses the river. Something large waits below.
en.entity.brianna.title: Brianna
en.entity.shoals.title: Shrimp Shoals
en.entity.campfire.title: Campfire
en.entity.supply-crate.title: Supply Crate
en.entity.bridge-sign.title: Bridge Sign
en.entity.hermit.title: Hermit
en.entity.herb-patch.title: Herb Patch
en.entity.cracked-bowl.title: Cracked Bowl
en.entity.river.title: River
en.entity.gommi.title: Gommi
en.entity.loose-plank.title: Loose Plank
en.action.entity.brianna.talk.title: Talk
en.action.entity.shoals.fish.title: Fish
en.action.entity.shoals.fish.description: Sweep the shallows with a small net.
en.action.entity.shoals.examine.title: Examine
en.action.entity.campfire.cook.title: Cook
en.action.entity.campfire.cook.description: Cook whatever you are carrying that the fire can warm.
en.action.entity.supply-crate.examine.title: Examine
en.action.entity.bridge-sign.read.title: Read
en.action.entity.hermit.talk.title: Talk
en.action.entity.hermit.talk.description: Ask the hermit about the river.
en.action.entity.herb-patch.gather.title: Gather
en.action.entity.cracked-bowl.take.title: Take
en.action.entity.cracked-bowl.combine.title: Combine
en.action.entity.cracked-bowl.combine.descr: Mix shrimp and herb in the bowl.
en.action.entity.river.use-draught.title: Use Draught
en.action.entity.river.use-draught.descript: Pour the draught into the slow eddy.
en.action.entity.river.examine.title: Examine
en.action.entity.gommi.pay-toll.title: Pay Toll
en.action.entity.gommi.pay-toll.description: Offer cooked food at the bridge.
en.action.entity.gommi.examine.title: Examine
en.action.entity.gommi.examine-asleep.title: Examine
en.action.entity.loose-plank.examine.title: Examine
en.chat.entity.shoals.examine: Shrimp dart away from your shadow.
en.chat.entity.supply-crate.examine-neither: A net and bowl sit on top, practically accusing you of missing them.
en.chat.entity.supply-crate.examine-net-onl: A bowl still sits at the bottom of the crate.
en.chat.entity.supply-crate.examine-bowl-on: A small net still sits at the bottom of the crate.
en.chat.entity.supply-crate.examine-both: An empty supply crate. Nothing left worth taking.
en.chat.entity.bridge-sign.read: The word FOOD is carved deeper than the rest.
en.chat.entity.cracked-bowl.take: The bowl leaves a damp ring behind.
en.chat.entity.river.use-draught: Gommi slumps under the bridge, snoring like a sawmill.
en.chat.entity.river.examine: A slow eddy curls under Gommi’s bridge, deep enough to carry a cupful without a splash.
en.chat.entity.gommi.pay-toll: Gommi eats first and negotiates never.
en.chat.entity.gommi.examine: Big hands. Bigger appetite. He watches every snack that crosses the bridge.
en.chat.entity.gommi.examine-asleep: Gommi is out cold, snoring louder than the river.
en.chat.entity.loose-plank.examine: A tempting plank, but it wobbles and would not hold your weight over open water.
en.dialogue.brianna.start: You look hungry. Don't worry, we all showed up half-starved. Want the rundown?
en.dialogue.brianna.explain-food: Net from the crate, shrimp from the shoals, heat from the campfire. Simple enough once you've done it twice.
en.dialogue.brianna.explain-buff: A hot meal makes you feel steadier for a while — your body recovers a bit faster than usual. Worth having a shrimp cooked and ready before you go looking for trouble.
en.dialogue.hermit.start: Hrmph. Another one. What do you want?
en.dialogue.hermit.explain-draught: Fish and herb, mixed in a bowl, then warmed. What comes out sleeps whatever drinks it. Rivers carry things further than people expect — further than a bridge, even.

en.location.tutorial-bank.title: Island Bank
en.location.tutorial-bank.description: A tidy counter and an open trapdoor share the room.
en.location.tutorial-bank.exhausted: The teller returns to sorting coins.
en.entity.bank-teller.title: Bank Teller
en.entity.trapdoor.title: Trapdoor
en.action.entity.bank-teller.talk.title: Talk
en.action.entity.trapdoor.examine.title: Examine
en.chat.entity.trapdoor.examine: A ladder disappears into the dark below. Someone left it open on purpose.
en.dialogue.bank-teller.start: Afternoon. Haven't seen you before — first time at a bank?
en.dialogue.bank-teller.explain: Every bank shares one account, anywhere in the world — deposit here, withdraw anywhere. Your pack only holds so many different kinds of things at once, so once it fills up, this is where the rest goes. You've already got a little gold sitting in yours.
en.dialogue.bank-teller.show-vault: Here you go — have a look.
en.dialogue.bank-teller.not-now: Come back whenever. The vault is not going anywhere.

en.action.descend-to-mine.title: Descend
en.action.descend-to-mine.success: You climb into the cave below.
en.location.tutorial-mine.title: Training Mine
en.location.tutorial-mine.description: Copper and tin glint in a cramped cave.
en.location.tutorial-forge.title: Cave Forge
en.location.tutorial-forge.description: A furnace and anvil are wedged into a hot alcove.
en.entity.denzel.title: Denzel
en.entity.copper-rock.title: Copper Rock
en.entity.tin-rock.title: Tin Rock
en.entity.locked-chest.title: Locked Chest
en.entity.mine-tunnel.title: Mine Tunnel
en.entity.furnace.title: Furnace
en.entity.anvil.title: Anvil
en.entity.forge-table.title: Forge Table
en.action.entity.denzel.talk.title: Talk
en.action.entity.denzel.talk.success: Denzel hands over a pickaxe and points at the rocks.
en.action.entity.denzel.examine.title: Examine
en.action.entity.copper-rock.mine.title: Mine Copper
en.action.entity.tin-rock.mine.title: Mine Tin
en.action.entity.locked-chest.pick.title: Pick Lock
en.action.entity.locked-chest.examine.title: Examine
en.action.entity.mine-tunnel.enter-forge.de: Walk deeper to the forge alcove.
en.action.entity.furnace.smelt.title: Smelt
en.action.entity.furnace.smelt.description: Smelt whatever ores you are carrying that the furnace can use.
en.action.entity.anvil.smith.title: Smith
en.action.entity.anvil.smith.description: Hammer whatever bars you are carrying into shape.
en.chat.entity.denzel.examine: Denzel keeps glancing at the chest, then pretending he did not.
en.chat.entity.locked-chest.pick: The lock gives all at once, spilling ore, bars, and a dagger better than anything at the anvil.
en.chat.entity.locked-chest.fail: The lock bites back. That was going to leave a mark either way.
en.chat.entity.locked-chest.examine: A prison-issue padlock, guarding something better than rocks.
en.dialogue.denzel.start: Pickaxe's yours, don't lose it. Rocks are through there. Anything else before you start swinging?
en.dialogue.denzel.option.ask-sentence: Why are you down here, anyway?
en.dialogue.denzel.explain-smithing: Copper plus tin makes bronze. Furnace first, anvil second — smelt it, then shape it. Simple, if you don't rush the furnace.
en.dialogue.denzel.explain-sentence: Let's just say this posting is part of my... sentence. I'd be out of here already if I hadn't drawn it. And don't touch the chest — that's not a hint, that's a rule.
en.dialogue.denzel.close: Go on, then. Rocks won't mine themselves.

en.location.tutorial-rat-cage.title: Combat Cage
en.location.tutorial-rat-cage.description: A rat cage, a portal, and a broad-shouldered instructor wait underground.
en.location.mainland-arrival.title: Mainland Pier
en.location.mainland-arrival.description: Open roads begin beyond a salt-stained pier.
en.entity.orloth.title: Orloth
en.entity.giant-rat.title: Giant Rat
en.entity.rat-cage-door.title: Rat Cage Door
en.entity.portal.title: Mainland Portal
en.entity.mainland-greeter.title: Dock Greeter
en.action.entity.forge-table.continue.title: Continue
en.action.entity.orloth.talk.title: Talk
en.action.entity.orloth.fight.title: Fight
en.action.entity.giant-rat.fight.title: Fight
en.action.entity.rat-cage-door.unlock.title: Unlock
en.action.entity.portal.step-through.title: Step Through
en.action.entity.portal.step-through.succes: The portal drops you on the mainland.
en.chat.entity.orloth.fight: Orloth laughs, trains you hard, and locks the empty cage behind him. Your health does not thank you for it.
en.chat.entity.rat-cage-door.unlock-orloth: The cage is empty except for Orloth, arms crossed, unimpressed with your priorities.
en.chat.entity.rat-cage-door.unlock: The cage is empty. The rats already had their say.
en.dialogue.orloth.start: So, you want to learn to fight. Good instinct, bad cage — those rats won't teach you finesse, but they'll teach you not to die. Questions before you go in?
en.dialogue.orloth.option.ask-stats: How do I know if I'm winning?
en.dialogue.orloth.explain-equip: Equipment tab, mainhand slot — any blade you've got will do for the cage.
en.dialogue.orloth.explain-stats: Attack wears the rats down, defense keeps you standing. Stats tab breaks down exactly how much of each you've got, if you want the numbers instead of a feeling.
en.dialogue.orloth.close: And don't try me directly. I'm not a rat.
en.dialogue.mainland-greeter.start: Thanks for playing Tutorial Island. Go make trouble somewhere larger.
